workOrder.summary: Add real requirement-row actions so students can focus evidence forms or send ready draft/revision submissions for teacher review.

selectionReason: The previous handoff pointed to a guided student requirement form. Current source already had student-scoped requirement guidance, evidence forms, and a protected submit endpoint, but the student checklist did not expose a real send-for-review action.
repoEvidence: functions/api/submissions/[id]/submit.ts already enforces signed-in student ownership, draft/revision status, and evidence requirement.
workspace.js already rendered student evidence link/upload forms but requirement rows were read-only.
functions/api/student/dashboard.ts already returned requirement and submission data, but not the matching submission id or per-submission evidence count.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor assignment, or student privacy boundary was broadened.
The visible submit action calls the existing submit endpoint, which only accepts the owning student and requires evidence.
No staff-only comments, storage identifiers, private Drive IDs, secrets, migrations, deploys, or live data writes were added.

validationResult.notes: Full required validation passed; git diff --check reported CRLF normalization warnings only.

nextRecommendedWorkOrder: Add a deeper student-safe requirement detail drawer only if it reuses persisted requirement/progress/submission/evidence records and existing authorized endpoints; otherwise return to the missing-submission drill-down mapping.
